summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Germany Fair page with amber/orange theme, live countdown timers, and all required features working correctly
passed_tests: Germany Fair page loads with correct amber/orange color theme (NOT German flag colors)
All 4 countdown timers present on schedule cards (Jammu, Pathankot, Amritsar, Ludhiana)
Countdown timers show Days, Hrs, Min, Sec format and are actively ticking/updating
All 9 universities listed including 'University of Europe for Applied Sciences'
Video placeholder section present with proper content
VisaXpert branding section displays all 4 stats: 4000+ Germany Visas, Since 2012, Best Visa Success Rate, ICEF
Form submission successfully creates leads with source 'germany_fair'
Benefits section prominently displays €1000 discount and 50% fee waiver
Dashboard login works with admin@visaxpert.com credentials
Dashboard shows germany_fair leads confirming form integration
Thank you modal appears after successful form submission
All interactive elements (buttons, forms, links) are clickable and functional
